tc.productDetailHTML:
基本信息
實名登記 《電訊（登記用戶識別卡）規例》（以下簡稱「《規例》」）已於2021年9月1日生效。根據該《規例》， 自2022年3月1日起，可於本地使用的預付儲值卡必須先完成實名登記才可啓用有關電訊服務。將實體SIM卡插入手機或將eSIM下載安裝至手機以完成實名登記後即可啟用服務。按此登記
數據用量 此卡提供4G/5G網絡流動數據服務。45GB 內地、香港及澳門數據。
可用日數 365日。啟用儲值卡當日起計之第365日(香港時間) 23:59終止。
有效期 自購買日起計一年內可啟用，逾期無效。
覆蓋地區 中國内地、香港、澳門
可否增值 客戶可於數據使用完畢或有效期到期後30日內為SIM卡增值以重新啟用以下服務
增值金額: HK$250
數據組合: 36GB 內地、香港及澳門數據
有效期: 365 日
備註:
(1)當365日有效期到期或數據使用完畢時，數據功能會被暫停，未用完之數據用量將會作廢。如用戶需要繼續使用服務，用戶必須於30日內增值，否則SIM卡失效。
(2)有效期屆滿後或數據使用完畢後30日內，增值HK$250 可重新啟用數據組合(有效期365日)。
(3)重新啟用的數據組合的用量會從重新啟用之日起重新計算，並不會與之前到期未使用完畢的用量疊加。
啟用地點 中國内地、香港、澳門
SIM類型 Nano、Micro、Normal SIM 三合一 (適合各款手機)

en.prepaidCardName_EN: Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau 365-Day Data SIM (36GB+9GB)
en.productDetailHTML_EN:
Basic information
Real-Name Registration The Telecommunications (Registration of SIM Cards) Regulation (“Regulation”) came into effect on 1st September 2021. Pursuant to the Regulation, prepaid SIM cards that can be used in Hong Kong must complete Real-Name Registration in order to activate or continue the use of telecommunications service from 1 March 2022. Insert the physical SIM card into your mobile phone or download and install the eSIM to your mobile phone to complete the Real-Name Registration and then activate the service. Register Here.
Fair use of data It provides 4G/5G network mobile data service, 45GB in Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau.
Data validity period 365-Day. The SIM card will be expired on the 365th day at 23:59 Hong Kong time since card activation.
Validity period The prepaid card is valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. It will be invaild after expiry.
Coverage area Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau
Whether add value Customer can recharge the SIM card for service resumption in 365 days after the data is used up or the validity period expires
Re-charge amount: HK$250
Data package: 36GB Chinese Mainland & Hong Kong & Macau Data
Validity period: 365 Days
Note:
(1) Once the 365-day validity period expires or all data has been consumed, data service will be suspended. Unused data will be forfeited. To continue to use the service, customer has to recharge the SIM card within 30 days after the data is used up or the validity period expires. Otherwise, the SIM card will no longer be valid.
(2) Customer can recharge HK$250 to the SIM card so as to reactivate data package(365-day validity period) within 30 days after all data has been consumed or validity period expires.
(3) The usage of reactivated data package will be recalculated from the data of reactivation, and will not be accumulated with the expired unused usage.
Enable the location Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau
SIM type Nano、Micro、 Normal All-in-one SIM
User Guide Click to view
eSIM Click to view

Basic information
Fair useuse of data The SIM card provides 4G network mobile data service. Once your total data usage reach "Fair Usage Level (FUP)" 8GB, the upload/download speed would be reduced and restricted(minimum 512kbps) and tethering and Peer-to-Peer services would not be available.
Data validity period 15-Day. Every 24 hours from the activation time is counted as one day, and any less than one hour is also counted as one hour, and is calculated in Hong Kong time.
Coverage area France
Voice/SMS 20 mins France Voice + 10 SMS~France Voice(mins) can be use for call service in France (to receive and make outgoing calls to France number) . All voice calls are charged at 1 minute increment. Not applicalbe to dial IDD call.#SMS service credit are applicable for sending SMS in France.
Whether add value This SIM card is non-rechargeable
Last activation date Please refer to the back of the packing
Enable the location France. Insert the SIM card into the mobile phone and the mobile network signal will be detected. This means the SIM card has been activated automatically and the service has been commenced. The validity period of the SIM card service starts from the day of activation and service commencement.
SIM type Nano、Micro、 Normal All-in-one SIM
User Guide Insert the SIM card into the mobile phone and the mobile network signal will be detected.
